feed.title: AI Security Daily Digest
feed.subtitle: AIセキュリティに関する日次ニュースダイジェスト - 研究・ニュース・政策動向を自動収集・要約

entry.title: The Future of Age Verification: Your Face Never Leaves Your Device
entry.content:
As age verification laws expand worldwide, organizations face growing pressure to protect users' privacy while meeting regulatory requirements. Incode explains how on-device age estimation verifies ag

Source: Bleeping Computer
